input: Using only the embedded packet, compute all derived fields, classify each record (fail/warn/pass) according to the provided scoring rule, rank governing risks, and recommend the smallest sufficient remediation action(s) that meet the remediation budget constraint. Produce two deliverables: (1) use_error_synthesis.xlsx containing reproducible formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, and sensitivity analysis; (2) hf_validation_memo.md containing explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, explanations of classification changes, justification of the recommended action(s), and a final decision table. Apply score = metric1 + 0.6*metric2 - 0.25*metric3 after unit normalization; score > normalized_threshold_score => fail; score within 10% below threshold => warn. Remediation options may be combined only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd. An expert review is required if any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift. Do not use external data or hidden inputs; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
label: neutral
